title: [codereview-pass-3] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:4.4 Rule 2 ICMP Echo table sends both Type and Code; Code always 0 for Echo so use equal/not-sent. Minor optimization but aligns with spec style in other rules P3
description: For ICMPv6 Echo Request/Reply, Code is fixed at 0. Setting MO=equal TV=0 CDA=not-sent saves the byte. Current value-sent for both is consistent with other rules but not optimal. Low priority style/consistency finding.
close_reason: Updated Rule 2 table in draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:4.4 to use ignore/value-sent for ICMPv6.Type (which is sent) and equal/not-sent for Code=0; aligned table with rules.rs implementation and appendix-schc.md; also improved HopLimit/IID docs for consistency
